fields.name: Monster Energy
fields.description: The original green Monster Energy drink. 160mg caffeine per 16oz can with a bold, sweet flavor.

fields.name: Red Bull
fields.description: The iconic Austrian energy drink that gives you wings. 80mg caffeine per 8.4oz can.

fields.name: C4 Energy
fields.description: Pre-workout inspired energy drink with 200mg caffeine, no sugar, and performance-focused ingredients.

fields.name: Bang Energy
fields.description: High-stimulant energy drink with 300mg caffeine, zero sugar, and added BCAAs.

fields.name: Ghost Energy
fields.description: Lifestyle energy drink with 200mg caffeine, natural flavors, and licensed flavor collaborations.

fields.name: Reign
fields.description: Performance energy drink with 300mg caffeine, BCAAs, CoQ10, and electrolytes. Zero sugar.

fields.name: Rockstar
fields.description: Classic energy drink with a bold taste. 160mg caffeine per 16oz can in a variety of flavors.

fields.name: 5-Hour Energy
fields.description: Concentrated 2oz energy shot with 200mg caffeine. No crash formula with B-vitamins.
